nodes.label: Python Fundamentals
nodes.description: Master Python basics: data types, control flow, functions, and object-oriented programming

nodes.label: NumPy Essentials
nodes.description: Learn array manipulation, broadcasting, linear algebra operations, and vectorization

nodes.label: Pandas for Data Manipulation
nodes.description: Master DataFrames, data cleaning, transformation, grouping, and time series operations

nodes.label: Data Visualization
nodes.description: Create insightful visualizations using Matplotlib, Seaborn, and Plotly

nodes.label: Statistical Analysis
nodes.description: Apply descriptive and inferential statistics, hypothesis testing, and probability distributions

nodes.label: SQL and Databases
nodes.description: Query relational databases, perform joins, aggregations, and integrate with pandas

nodes.label: Machine Learning Basics
nodes.description: Understand supervised vs unsupervised learning, model evaluation, and cross-validation

nodes.label: Scikit-learn Foundation
nodes.description: Implement regression, classification, and clustering algorithms using scikit-learn

nodes.label: Feature Engineering
nodes.description: Learn feature scaling, encoding, selection, and dimensionality reduction techniques

nodes.label: Model Optimization
nodes.description: Master hyperparameter tuning, ensemble methods, and model interpretation

nodes.label: Deep Learning Intro
nodes.description: Build neural networks with TensorFlow/Keras, understand backpropagation and optimization

nodes.label: End-to-End Project
nodes.description: Complete a full data science project: from data collection to model deployment
